name: kuskus-kusto-language-server
description: Language server for the Kusto query language

kuskusLanguageServer.diagnosticsEnabled.description: Whether diagnostics are enabled or not (red squiggly underlines, Problems tab)

enumDescriptions: Log errors to the local VS Code output channel (Output → Kuskus). No data leaves your machine.
Disable all error logging, including the local output channel.

Log locally AND send anonymous error reports to the Kuskus maintainer via Azure Application Insights. Errors only — no query content, no cluster names, no PII. Also requires VS Code's telemetry.telemetryLevel to be 'error' or higher. See the privacy statement.
kuskusLanguageServer.telemetry.markdownDescription: Controls error logging. `local` (default): output channel only, nothing leaves your machine. `none`: silent. `opt-in`: local + App Insights (see [privacy statement](https://github.com/rosshamish/kuskus/blob/master/PRIVACY.md)).

scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ../server && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.lint:fix: cd client && npm run lint:fix && cd ../server && npm run lint:fix && cd ..
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
